function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-10-28
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0001                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-10-28                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write frontmatter to bill record preserving exact body
next_step.observation: First target invoice file was updated with schema-compliant frontmatter and preserved body text.

purchased_on: 2026-04-09
total_eur: 27
counterparty: Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien
project: Window Farm Notes
related_entity: Oskar Novak
lines:
  - item: self-watering tray
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 19
    line_eur: 19
  - item: herb seed packets
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---

## Notes

Small child-friendly garden experiment that matters mostly because it might stick as a care routine.

function.message: Completed the inbox request by running both specified finance documents through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to the invoice and bill records while preserving each original note body verbatim, then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in each entered folder, inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before edits, preserved original file bodies exactly beneath frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR two listed finance docs. Both files contained all required visible fields/line items for the finance schema, enabling exact frontmatter extraction without guessing. Updates were applied in place per migration workflow, and inbox cleanup was performed per process-next-inbox-item and 00_inbox rules.
